jsonld.name: Aesthetic Calibration Opacity
jsonld.description: Inability to determine whether your structural-to-aesthetic mappings are learning from outcomes or remaining fixed, where you can't introspectively access whether failed predictions recalibrate your proxy metrics or leave them unchanged.
